batches.description: Localize all views to match Figma design (Korean text, layout fixes, pixel-perfect styling)

tasks.title: Localize types, constants, and mock data to Korean
tasks.description: Update USER_TABLE_COLUMNS labels, BASIC_INFO_ROW labels, form field options, and mock user data to Korean matching the Figma design exactly.

tasks.title: Localize sidebar component to Korean and match Figma
tasks.description: Change all sidebar navigation labels, admin subtitle, and logout text to Korean. Match Figma sidebar layout exactly.

tasks.title: Localize dashboard page components to Korean and fix layout
tasks.description: Update page-header, tab-navigation, search-bar, pagination-controls, badge, and page.tsx to Korean. Fix pagination button layout to match Figma (all 4 nav buttons together, then page indicator).

tasks.title: Localize user detail page to Korean and match Figma
tasks.description: Update user-detail-form section labels, toggle labels, and detail page header props to Korean.
